title: Berberine vs Metformin for Women Over 40: What the Research Shows
seo_title: Berberine vs Metformin for Women Over 40
meta_description: Berberine and metformin both target blood sugar and metabolism. See how they compare for women over 40, including safety, dosage, and what research actually says.
